'''Auren Yomm Baobab''' {{Pronounced|AW-ren YOM BAY-oh-bab; IPA: /ˌɔ.ɹɛn ˈjɑm be(i).o.bab}} was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Roon/Legends|Roon]]. The daughter of [[Nilz Yomm|Nilz]] and [[Bola Yomm]], by the age of fifteen, Auren Yomm was an accomplished athlete and served as the leader of the [[Umboo Racing Team]] during the [[Roon Colonial Games]] of [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]. It was during this time that she met and befriended [[Mungo Baobab]], whom she would later [[Marriage/Legends|marry]], and his two [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].

==Biography==
A native of [[Umboo]],<ref name="SWD: TRG">{{DroidsCite|The Roon Games}}</ref> a sovereign province on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Roon/Legends|Roon]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] Auren Yomm was born in the year [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] to [[Nilz Yomm]], a local [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]], and his wife, [[Bola Yomm|Bola]].<ref name="DB" /> An accomplished athlete by age fifteen, she specialized in the [[Drainsweeper/Legends|drainsweeper]] event, a three-stage relay race performed while riding [[rockhopper]]s, during the [[Roon Colonial Games]] of [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]].<ref name="SWD: TRG" /> While on their way to the Games, Auren and her father Nilz witnessed the crash of a [[cloudcraft]] piloted by [[Mungo Baobab]], a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] from the planet [[Manda/Legends|Manda]]. Rescuing Baobab and his two [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO]], from a pack of meddlesome, albeit benign [[Mudman|mudmen]], Auren invited the off-worlders to accompany her and her father to the Roon Games, where they would be able to find somebody to repair their ship.<ref name="SWD: TRG" />

Her [[Umboo Racing Team|original team]] composed of her friend [[Gee Long]] and the droid [[BIX]]. [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Bisad Koong]] of [[Tawntoom]] province attempted to sabotage them by eliminating Long and Bix from the competition, but Mungo Baobab and C-3PO raced in their place and won the championship with Auren.<ref name="SWD: TRG" /> Later, Koong poisoned Umboo province with a chemical agent called [[Rooze Disease|rooze]]. As Auren and her father were accompanying Mungo and his droids to the [[Pinnacles of Felth]], they were not affected by the poisonous chemical, but Auren's mother Bola fell prey to the attack and became ill.<ref name="SWD: TFC">{{DroidsCite|The Frozen Citadel}}</ref> Due to a malfunction on his ship, Koong also fell ill from rooze poisoning and tasked [[Gaff]] with kidnapping Nilz Yomm, who was a doctor, and his daughter in order to create an antidote. Meanwhile, Mungo Baobab, C-3PO, and R2-D2 tracked Governor Koong to the [[Fortress of Tawntoom]], where Auren and her father were being held captive. After their rescue, the Yomms escaped the Tawntoom as Koong's fortress froze and as Koong himself dematerialized as a result of the rooze.<ref name="SWD: TFC" />

Sometime after their adventures on Roon, Auren Yomm and Mungo Baobab were [[Marriage/Legends|married]] and took up residence on the planet [[Quilken/Legends|Quilken]].<ref name="IA" />
